more of the story


Code
set.seed(123)  # For reproducibility
x <- rnorm(50, mean = 5, sd = 2)
y <- 2 * x + rnorm(50, mean = 0, sd = 3)

# Create a basic scatterplot
plot(x, y,
     main = "Sample Scatterplot",
     xlab = "X Variable",
     ylab = "Y Variable",
     pch = 19,           # Solid circles
     col = "steelblue",  # Point color
     cex = 1.2)          # Point size

# Add a regression line
abline(lm(y ~ x), col = "red", lwd = 2)

# Add a grid for easier reading
grid()

title: About
text: Welcome to my page! My name is Nate Bloomquist and I am a senior at the University of Nebraska-Lincoln who is double-majoring in Sports Media and Communications and Advertising and Public Relations with a minor in History. I am an individual who builds lasting connections between fans or consumers and the teams or brands that they care about. With a background in sports media, communications, advertising and public relations, I know how to make media and campaigns that are memorable and have a meaningful impact. What sets me apart from others is my ability to come up with creative and innovative ideas for campaigns and different forms of media while keeping the consumers interests in mind. I bring creativity, enthusiasm and a genuine passion for advertising and athletics to every task that is put in front of me.
